contradictions.claim_text: No comparable prompt-engineering products exist locally in Luxembourg.
contradictions.resolution: Drop any empty-market or knowledge-scarcity wedge. The defensible angle has to be product-specific customisation or delivery execution, not access to prompting know-how.
contradictions.why_it_matters: Without this falsification step, the dashboard would overstate differentiation and demand certainty.

open_issues.claim_text: Luxembourg company training co-funding is relevant to this product category.
open_issues.notes: Scheme-level co-funding exists, but workshop-level eligibility remains unproven.

open_issues.claim_text: The workshop will deliver a company-specific prompt library of 30-50 tested prompts.
open_issues.notes: Keep this out of the truth layer until the deliverable exists and is evidenced.

open_issues.claim_text: Customization is the main differentiator, not knowledge.
open_issues.notes: This may be commercially true, but public evidence does not establish it.

open_issues.claim_text: SME Package AI 70% applies to this workshop.
open_issues.notes: No public source in the rerun proved the exact AI package applicability.

open_issues.claim_text: The workshop can be sold as a 1-2 day format with a prompt library outcome.
open_issues.notes: The quoted public evidence speaks to competitor formats, not this workshop design.
